# Templates

## Purpose

Provides standardized starter templates for recurring documentation and artifact creation.

## Contains

- Document templates (e.g., ADR templates, Linear issue templates).
- Standardized section structures and boilerplate layouts.
- Guidance on how to initialize recurring documents.

## Does Not Contain

- Filled-out canonical documentation instances.
- Process execution steps.
- Code boilerplates for application source files.

## Related Directories

- `docs/standards/`
- `docs/playbooks/`

## Related Documents

- [linear-issue-template.md](file:///Users/guru/Dev/Almagos%20Labs/docs/templates/linear-issue-template.md)

## Naming Conventions

Use lower-case kebab-case with `-template` suffix (e.g., `adr-template.md`).
